Primary denominator: Campaign-window participant-days with any non-missing personal PPM PM fraction
Notes: Valid support is any non-missing ICARUS PPM PM1, PM2.5, or PM10 value inside the campaign window.

Primary denominator: Campaign-window participant-days with complete ordered PM1/PM2.5/PM10 timestamp support
Notes: Valid support requires complete ordered PM1 <= PM2.5 <= PM10 triplets before daily aggregation.

Primary denominator: Campaign-window participant-days with any non-missing residential uHoo IAQ variable
Notes: Valid support is any non-missing uHoo residential IAQ value inside the campaign window.

Primary denominator: Campaign-window participant-days with Garmin average heart-rate or stress support
Notes: Valid support is non-missing average heart rate or stress after applying the current heart-rate plausibility filter.

Primary denominator: Participant-night sleep-stage availability for Total, Light, Deep, and REM sleep
Notes: Sleep stages are reconstructed from harmonized rows; sleep efficiency is unavailable and is not counted.

Analysis/data stream: Garmin sleep + residential IAQ complete-case model input
Primary denominator: Participant-night complete cases for sleep outcomes plus residential uHoo IAQ predictors
Notes: Complete cases require sleep Total/Light/Deep/REM plus all currently available uHoo residential IAQ predictors.

Primary denominator: Campaign-window daily personal PPM PM common-support input used for scenario HIA
Notes: Matches the common-support daily personal PPM input used for scenario-based HIA.
